overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring a Japanese shrine complex. The character observes sumo wrestlers training in a courtyard, walks through traditional wooden shrine architecture with red accents and autumn foliage, and exits into a nature setting with a torii gate and wooden bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shrine courtyard with sumo wrestling ring

events.description: two sumo wrestlers begin grappling and fighting in the center of the courtyard
character turns away from the sumo match and begins walking toward the shrine buildings

agents.ego_description: standing and watching the sumo match, then turning and walking away from the courtyard toward the shrine interior

notable_agents.action: two sumo wrestlers grappling and throwing each other in the dirt ring

entered.detail: large traditional wooden shrine building with ornate curved roof and gold accents
bright red wooden fence surrounding the courtyard area
circular dirt ring where the sumo wrestlers are fighting
raised wooden deck area where spectators are seated

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a sunlit shrine courtyard watching two sumo wrestlers train in a dirt ring. Spectators sit on a wooden platform to the right, while a large traditional shrine building with ornate architecture dominates the background behind red wooden fences.

scene_state.functional_zone: shrine complex interior with traditional wooden gates and buildings

events.description: exits the open sumo courtyard into a more enclosed shrine walkway
character turns left while walking through the shrine complex

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shrine complex, passing between wooden buildings and red fences

entered.detail: elaborate wooden shrine gate with curved roof and decorative elements
smaller wooden shrine structure with traditional architecture
trees with bright red and orange autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the sumo courtyard through the shrine complex, passing red wooden fences and approaching an ornate wooden shrine gate. Autumn maple trees with red foliage appear to the left as the character navigates between traditional wooden buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: nature path with torii gate leading to sacred grove

events.description: exits the shrine complex through a large wooden gate into an open natural area
ground becomes covered with fallen red autumn leaves as the character approaches the torii gate

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path covered in red autumn leaves toward a large red torii gate

notable_agents.action: villager sitting by the path near the exit gate

entered.detail: tall red torii gate marking the entrance to the sacred grove ahead
large wooden gate being walked through to exit the shrine complex
traditional stone lantern beside the dirt path
small wooden shrine structure with offerings

segments.scene_description: The character exits the shrine complex through a large wooden gate into a natural setting with dense autumn foliage. Walking along a leaf-covered dirt path toward a prominent red torii gate, the scene opens up to grassy meadows and scattered trees under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge over water in shrine grounds

events.description: steps onto a wooden bridge crossing over a body of water
encounters two pedestrians walking in the opposite direction on the bridge

agents.ego_description: crossing a wooden bridge over water, passing other pedestrians coming from the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: two villagers in traditional clothing walking across the bridge toward the camera

entered.detail: traditional wooden bridge with weathered planks crossing over water
wooden railings with stone posts on the left side of the bridge
calm water visible beneath and beside the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a traditional wooden bridge crossing over calm water, leaving the torii gate behind. The bridge has wooden railings with stone posts, and the character passes two villagers walking in the opposite direction as they continue across.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the structured activity of a shrine courtyard into the serene openness of a natural autumn landscape. It begins in a sunlit courtyard where sumo wrestlers train in a dirt ring before spectators and ornate shrine architecture, then moves away from the ring as the character navigates through red wooden fences and traditional buildings. As the camera passes beneath an ornate wooden gate, the scene shifts from the architectural complex into a wilder setting filled with vibrant red maple trees and leaf-covered paths. The view then expands across grassy meadows toward a prominent red torii gate, finally leading the character across a traditional wooden bridge over calm water as they pass villagers heading in the opposite direction.
